title: In the Deep
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Andrew, Judy & Thudd pilot Uncle Al's Water Bug into the Challenger Deep to save the giant squid from Soggy Bob's squidwich plans!

q.en: Why are Andrew, Judy, and Thudd racing deep into the ocean?
q.zh: 安德鲁、朱迪和沙德为什么要往深海深处赶？

options.en: To save the giant squid from Soggy Bob, who wants to turn it into squidwiches
options.zh: 去把巨乌贼从湿答答鲍勃手里救出来，他想把乌贼做成乌贼三明治

options.en: To find buried treasure on the ocean floor
options.zh: 去海底寻找埋藏的宝藏

options.en: To visit their Uncle Al on a vacation cruise
options.zh: 去坐游轮度假看望他们的阿尔叔叔

options.en: To race Soggy Bob to the surface of the water
options.zh: 和湿答答鲍勃比谁先浮到水面

explain.en: Soggy Bob Sloggins wants the giant squid for his Animal Universe theme park squidwiches, so the kids rush to the deepest ocean to stop him.
explain.zh: 湿答答鲍勃想抓巨乌贼给他的动物宇宙主题公园做乌贼三明治，所以孩子们赶往深海最深处去阻止他。

options.en: Uncle Al's submarine made from an old Volkswagen Beetle
options.zh: 阿尔叔叔用一辆旧的大众甲壳虫汽车改造的潜水艇

options.en: A real insect that lives in the bathtub
options.zh: 一只住在浴缸里的真虫子

options.en: A small boat that Andrew built from wood
options.zh: 安德鲁用木头造的小船

options.en: A flying saucer borrowed from aliens
options.zh: 从外星人那里借来的飞碟

explain.en: The Water Bug used to be an old Volkswagen Beetle until Uncle Al turned it into a submarine with a glass floor and a sharky fin.
explain.zh: 水虫号本来是一辆旧的大众甲壳虫，后来阿尔叔叔把它改成了潜水艇，有玻璃地板和鲨鱼鳍。

q.en: What is 'bioluminescence,' the living light Andrew and Thudd see in the dark ocean?
q.zh: 安德鲁和沙德在黑暗海洋里看到的「生物发光」(bioluminescence) 是什么？

options.en: Light made by bacteria living inside many ocean animals
options.zh: 由生活在许多海洋动物体内的细菌制造出来的光

options.en: Sunlight reflecting off the surface of the water
options.zh: 阳光从海面反射下来的光

options.en: Electricity from Soggy Bob's machines
options.zh: 湿答答鲍勃机器发出的电

options.en: Glow-in-the-dark paint Uncle Al applied
options.zh: 阿尔叔叔涂的夜光漆

explain.en: Thudd explains that the living light of most creatures comes from bacteria inside their cells — a kind of teamwork called mutualism.
explain.zh: 沙德解释说，大多数动物的生物发光来自它们细胞里的细菌——这是一种叫作互利共生的合作关系。

q.en: How do Andrew and Judy realize the flashing sawfish signal means 'Help'?
q.zh: 安德鲁和朱迪怎么知道那条锯鱼闪的光信号是「求救」？

options.en: It is Morse code SOS: three short, three long, three short flashes
options.zh: 那是摩斯电码的 SOS：三短、三长、再三短 的闪光

options.en: The sawfish is shouting the word 'Help' out loud
options.zh: 锯鱼大声喊出了「救命」这个词

options.en: Thudd translates the fish's bubbles
options.zh: 沙德翻译了鱼吐的泡泡

options.en: Uncle Al sends them a text message
options.zh: 阿尔叔叔给他们发了短信

explain.en: Judy learned Morse code from her parents before her first African safari; SOS (three short, three long, three short) is the code word for 'Help.'
explain.zh: 朱迪在第一次去非洲 Safari 前跟父母学了摩斯电码；SOS（三短、三长、三短）就是「救命」的代号。

q.zh: 「挑战者深渊」(Challenger Deep) 是什么？

options.en: The deepest place in the ocean, about seven miles deep
options.zh: 海洋中最深的地方，大约七英里（十一公里）深

options.en: A shallow swimming pool for dolphins
options.zh: 给海豚用的浅水游泳池

options.en: A tall mountain above the clouds
options.zh: 云朵上方的一座高山

options.en: Soggy Bob's theme park name
options.zh: 湿答答鲍勃主题公园的名字

explain.en: Uncle Al says the Challenger Deep is the deepest place in the ocean — seven miles deep, deep enough to bury the tallest mountain. Only two people have ever been to the bottom.
explain.zh: 阿尔叔叔说挑战者深渊是海洋最深处——七英里深，深得能埋下最高的山。只有两个人曾经到过海底。

q.en: What are 'black smokers' on the ocean floor?
q.zh: 海底的「黑烟囱」(black smokers) 是什么？

options.en: Chimneys where 2000-degree water boils up carrying black minerals from inside the earth
options.zh: 海底裂缝处约2000度热水带着地球内部的黑色矿物质翻涌出来，堆成的烟囱状喷口

options.en: People smoking pipes on a submarine
options.zh: 在潜水艇上抽烟斗的人

options.en: Burning campfires left by sailors
options.zh: 水手留下的篝火

options.en: Black fish that blow smoke
options.zh: 会吐烟的黑色鱼

explain.en: Thudd explains that deep cracks in the ocean floor let super-hot water boil up and drag black minerals from the earth's crust, piling them into chimney shapes.
explain.zh: 沙德解释说，海底的深裂缝让极热的水翻涌而上，把地壳里的黑色矿物质带出来，堆成烟囱的形状。

q.en: Why don't deep-sea fish get crushed by the huge water pressure?
q.zh: 为什么深海鱼不会被巨大的水压压扁？

options.en: Fish are made of water, and water does not crush water — only air spaces get crushed
options.zh: 鱼本身就是水做的，水不会压扁水，只有里面的空气空间才会被压扁

options.en: They wear tiny metal suits
options.zh: 它们穿着微型金属宇航服

options.en: The water pressure stops below one mile
options.zh: 水压在一英里以下就消失了

options.en: Uncle Al makes them special shields
options.zh: 阿尔叔叔给它们做了特殊盾牌

explain.en: Thudd says fish are made of water, so the pressure doesn't crush them; it only crushes spaces filled with air, and deep fish have no air spaces inside.
explain.zh: 沙德说鱼是水做的，所以水压不会压扁它们；水压只会压扁充满空气的空间，而深海鱼体内没有空气空间。

q.en: How do the kids turn the evil Soggy Bob back into a kind person?
q.zh: 孩子们怎样把变坏的湿答答鲍勃变回好人？

options.en: They flash lights at him to hypnotize him and replace Doctor Kron-Tox's bad message
options.zh: 他们用闪光灯对他催眠，替换掉克朗毒博士植入的坏指令

options.en: They feed him a giant squid sandwich
options.zh: 他们喂他吃了一个巨乌贼三明治

options.en: They tickle him until he laughs
options.zh: 他们把他挠痒直到他大笑

options.en: They ask Uncle Al to arrest him
options.zh: 他们让阿尔叔叔把他抓起来

explain.en: Doctor Kron-Tox hypnotized Soggy Bob with flashing lights, so the kids use their own flashing lights to hypnotize him back to his old, kind self.
explain.zh: 克朗毒博士用闪光灯催眠了湿答答鲍勃，所以孩子们也用闪光灯把他重新催眠，唤回了他原本善良的自己。

q.en: What makes the colossal squid different from an ordinary giant squid?
q.zh: 「巨型乌贼」(colossal squid) 和普通巨乌贼有什么不同？

options.en: The colossal squid has swiveling hooks on its suckers; an ordinary giant squid does not
options.zh: 巨型乌贼的吸盘上有可转动的钩子，普通巨乌贼没有

options.en: The colossal squid is bright pink and sings songs
options.zh: 巨型乌贼是亮粉色还会唱歌

options.en: The ordinary giant squid is bigger than the colossal squid
options.zh: 普通巨乌贼比巨型乌贼更大

options.en: The colossal squid lives only in trees
options.zh: 巨型乌贼只生活在树上

explain.en: Uncle Al discovers the trapped squid is a colossal squid because ordinary giant squids do not have hooks on their suckers — only the colossal squid does.
explain.zh: 阿尔叔叔发现被困的是巨型乌贼，因为普通巨乌贼的吸盘上没有钩子，只有巨型乌贼才有。

q.en: According to True Stuff, what strange thing do sea cucumbers do?
q.zh: 根据书末「真相时间」(True Stuff)，海参会做什么奇怪的事？

options.en: They eat sand, digest the bacteria, and poop it out — and some throw their guts at predators
options.zh: 它们吃沙子、消化里面的细菌再排出来——有些还会把内脏甩向捕食者

options.en: They build underwater castles from shells
options.zh: 它们用贝壳在海底建城堡

options.en: They fly above the ocean like birds
options.zh: 它们像鸟一样在海上飞

options.en: They turn into stars at night
options.zh: 它们晚上会变成星星

explain.en: True Stuff says sea cucumbers suck sand off the ocean floor, digest the tiny living bits, and poop the sand back out. Some even throw their guts at predators as a snack and grow new ones!
explain.zh: 「真相时间」说海参会吸海底的沙子、消化里面的微生物再把沙子排出来。有些海参还会把内脏甩给捕食者当零食，几周后还能长出新的！
